v0.1-beta-28-gb5122d4*:  M Makefile  M TODO.md RM internal/tui/changelog.txt -> dist/changelog.txt  M flake.nix  M internal/tui/main.go ?? claude ?? dist/changelog.go ?? enter 
v0.1-beta-28-gb5122d4: test(e2e): batch wheel/pgup events with syncs to avoid InputParser coalescing
v0.1-beta-27-g156a6dc: test(e2e): replace ad-hoc time.Sleep in scrollback tests
v0.1-beta-26-g1f2e63e: test(e2e): replace remaining WaitForSilence in scrollback/session tests
v0.1-beta-25-g130760c: test(e2e): replace WaitForSilence with Sync across the suite
v0.1-beta-24-g4a779be: test(e2e): replace more sleeps with sync barriers
v0.1-beta-23-g29e1c4c: test(e2e): migrate overlay tests to native regions
v0.1-beta-22-ga8be5f8: test(e2e): migrate scrollback tests to native regions
v0.1-beta-21-gf02cdd5: feat(e2e): pilot scrollback test + nxtest sync API + OSC docs
v0.1-beta-20-gcb3b845: test(e2e): startFrontendForSession helper
v0.1-beta-19-ga3d9c4b: feat(nxtest): driver wrapper and sync helpers
v0.1-beta-18-g732748a: feat: sync markers end-to-end
v0.1-beta-17-gd6c7e43: feat(server): native region protocol and backend
v0.1-beta-16-gb75b05e: refactor(server): extract regionBackend interface
v0.1-beta-15-g694ba2c: fix: data races surfaced by the Go race detector
v0.1-beta-14-g52256d2: refactor(server): reuse protocol tree nodes in upgrade state
v0.1-beta-13-ga3db9dd: refactor(server): transfer full ServerConfig across live upgrade
v0.1-beta-12-g1753ca4: test(e2e): extend TestLogViewerOverlay prompt timeout under load
v0.1-beta-11-gaefcc4f: allow writes to .cache directory
v0.1-beta-10-ge6f63d9: test(e2e): loosen duplicate-line heuristic in scroll test
v0.1-beta-9-g756f217: test(e2e): ignore truncated last token in NoDataLoss counter walk
v0.1-beta-8-g655125b: test(e2e): extend ssh-exec prompt timeout to tolerate load
v0.1-beta-7-g068c943: test(e2e): wait for scrollback offset to advance between page-downs
v0.1-beta-6-gf080c57: fix: switch to new region when SpawnResponse beats the tree event
v0.1-beta-5-ge90167f: test(e2e): make TestLiveUpgradeNoDataLoss readiness check resilient
v0.1-beta-4-ge67ab46: fix: forward SSH flags to the new process during live upgrade
v0.1-beta-3-g2778ea6: fix: wire ConnectToServerMsg / ConnectedMsg through NxtermModel
v0.1-beta-2-gb424cde: use $XDG_RUNTIME_DIR/nxtermd.sock at default unix socket
v0.1-beta-1-g564dee8: add home-manager module for nxtermd systemd user service
        v0.1-beta: add claude files
0.14.0-153-gb8a5d0f: refactor: publish upgrade status via tree instead of broadcast messages
0.14.0-152-g9e9a270: refactor: remove status_request protocol, derive status from server tree
0.14.0-151-g62c6835: refactor: extract protocol handlers from Client into standalone functions
0.14.0-150-g19ab4cd: refactor: convert execCmdSync to iterative trampoline
0.14.0-149-g8763da2: refactor: group NxtermModel constructor params into AppContext
0.14.0-148-g8e1e55f: refactor: remove dead fields from SessionLayer and SessionManagerLayer
0.14.0-147-gdc89d44: refactor: simplify addClientReq to use normal tx pattern
0.14.0-146-g31899f5: refactor: replace shadow tree with transactional ServerTree
0.14.0-145-gd9e6ab3: refactor: replace PTYRegion mutex with actor goroutine
0.14.0-144-g951e0b1: refactor: rename MainLayer to NxtermModel, merge teaModel
0.14.0-143-gc3d09ae: refactor: extract SessionManagerLayer from MainLayer
0.14.0-142-g0762f45: refactor: split command types by handler layer
0.14.0-141-g4f99502: refactor: create TerminalLayer eagerly when tabs are added
0.14.0-140-gad08043: refactor: move ScrollbackLayer into the main layer stack
0.14.0-139-g8bd2503: refactor: unify TUI request/response through task system
0.14.0-138-ga9e90c5: refactor: typed request interface for server event loop
0.14.0-137-g289055e: docs: add config validation TODO
0.14.0-136-g565fd66: refactor: replace protocol and client dispatch switches with registry maps
0.14.0-135-g085fa5d: test: verify all regions survive live upgrade
0.14.0-134-g22c78a1: fix: propagate quit via error returns instead of quitRequested flag
0.14.0-133-g47605d3: fix: page down at bottom of scrollback exits scrollback mode
0.14.0-132-g3435ef2: fix: process focus buffer in drainUntil so connect layer receives input
0.14.0-131-g53c314e: fix: remove duplicate tab creation on spawn
0.14.0-130-g671f75a: fix: trim scrollback history on screen_update to prevent duplicates
0.14.0-129-g7d787a9: fix: send scrollback chunks newest-first for faster initial render
0.14.0-128-gc07eb5f: fix: scrollback wheel clamp, sync gap race, and post-sync phantom gap
0.14.0-127-g8fb683c: refactor: prioritize non-raw channels in main loop, one key at a time in focus mode
0.14.0-126-g929db44: fix: ConnectLayer focus routing and scrollback exit race
0.14.0-125-g2add6f2: fix: drain bubbletea queue after each pipeW write
0.14.0-124-g77d4507: fix: synchronous pipeW write+drain to avoid ordering issues
0.14.0-123-g108d775: fix: more pipeW deadlocks and p.Send deadlock in main loop
0.14.0-122-gdf1f261: fix: multiple dispatch issues in explicit main loop
0.14.0-121-g6398458: fix: execCmdSync deadlock in explicit main loop
0.14.0-120-g0a59d5b: Merge worktree-composed-baking-fox into main
0.14.0-119-g4bf1d78: refactor: replace bubbletea event loop with explicit main loop
0.14.0-118-gdc328b4: make: run e2e tests with -parallel 8 -timeout 30s
0.14.0-117-gd78974b: fix: writeLoop input loss and remaining test flakes
0.14.0-116-g62e1ece: e2e: reduce test sleeps for faster execution
0.14.0-115-g96db121: e2e: run tests in parallel and fix server races exposed by load
0.14.0-114-g530ba82: fix: preserve scrollback history across screen_update resets
0.14.0-113-gdc0a19b: e2e: add shared server to reduce test startup overhead
0.14.0-112-g8003ca8: fix: flaky TestAltScreenRestore race with less input readiness
0.14.0-111-g774a190: remove dead destroyResult.subscribers field
